base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_elevator_8_variants — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 metroid. Elevator — 8 variants (1/2/3/4/5/6/7/8) based on Samus equipment state × armor/suitless combo: 1-5 NORMAL, 2-6 ROCKET, 3-7 VARIA SUIT, 4-8 VARIA SUIT/ROCKET. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Elevator — 8 variants (1/2/3/4/5/6/7/8) based on Samus equipment state × armor/suitless combo: 1-5 NORMAL, 2-6 ROCKET, 3-7 VARIA SUIT, 4-8 VARIA SUIT/ROCKET
